_comment: OPTIONAL logs panel for the BOTTOM of golden-signals.json. Append this object to that dashboard's `panels` array (mind the comma). It puts a live error-log stream under the four metric signals so one dashboard shows 'is it slow/erroring' AND 'what's the error'. NOTE the datasource: golden-signals.json's `${datasource}` template var points at Prometheus, so this panel hardwires the Loki datasource by its fixed cluster uid `loki` (the uid set in prom-stack-values.yaml grafana.additionalDataSources). gridPos.y=28 places it below the existing saturation row (which ends at y=28); bump it if you've added rows. Requires the logging instrumentation (Serilog→stdout) to actually have data.
title: Recent errors (logs)
